violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet wiping cloth hanging on the side of the hand sink in the coffee shop.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Single-use containers in the kitchen have the food contact surface face up and need to be invert. Straws in the customer area of the coffee shop area not individually wrapped.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Unapproved poison or toxic material was observed in food establishment. Using 'No Splash' bleach in their sanitizer buckets to clean food surfaces.
Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not used and/or applied according to manufacturer's label. Bleach in the sanitizer bucket was reading >200ppm.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
